sourceTitle: Protecting Student Privacy and Your Data
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Your use of AI tools in the classroom must comply with the Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA). In particular, you cannot require students to create external accounts for tools Yale does not directly license.
evidenceLocator: Protecting Student Privacy and Your Data
